title: CRUCIX Market Shock Radar
subtitle: World events → market transmission channels
disclaimer: Experimental market-intelligence prototype. Not investment advice. No buy/sell recommendations.

shockScore.interpretation: Several relevant signals are present across market-sensitive categories. Score is moderated because many signals are concentrated in one category.

items.text: It is reported that Russia is facing another massive Ukrainian drone strike tonight. At least 410 attack drones have taken off toward Russia from multiple directions.
items.explanation: Geopolitical Escalation match based on keywords: strike, attack, drone, russia. Signal: It is reported that Russia is facing another massive Ukrainian drone strike tonight. At least 410 attack drones have taken off toward Russia from multiple directions.
